sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85171" key="polu/pastos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολύ-παστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n85171.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">much-besprinkled,</tr_> Hsch.s.v.<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κερχνωτά.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
